title: Caesar Cipher Reloaded
description:
The Caesar cipher shifts letters by a fixed amount, but this time the shift is less obvious.

Your task: Decode the following message:

fdhvdu_flskhu
hints: Every letter has been shifted the same number of positions through the alphabet
The shift is a double-digit number — try values between 15 and 25
Use the ROT13 operation in CyberChef but change the Amount field to 23
